    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 40 small targets on mobile and 69 on tablet.
  - [MEDIUM] Refactor fixed-width components
    - 1 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 1 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 1 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 564.68 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 167.88 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4522 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 863.45 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 7.3 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)

- Heavy initial-load requests: 6 (940.42 KB total)
- On-demand modularization candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images and media galleries (est. 88.98 KB)
    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 569.34 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [MEDIUM] Modularize heavy script asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB)
    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.
- External CSS/JS hosting checks:
  - SCRIPT www.googletagmanager.com: GREEN (Google Cloud); 2 request(s), 281.54 KB
- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.
  - [MEDIUM] Reduce third-party script payload and requests
    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 168.16 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 569.34 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 88.98 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 569.34 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.16 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 5056 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add canonical URL metadata
    - Use rel=canonical to reduce duplicate URL ambiguity for crawlers and tooling.
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 39 small targets on mobile and 66 on tablet.
  - [MEDIUM] Refactor fixed-width components
    - 2 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 1 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 1 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add missing expected site files
    - Missing expected file(s): /robots.txt.
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 569.34 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.16 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 5056 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 852.34 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 6.5 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)

    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 548.94 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 354.13 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.07 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 5207 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 944.78 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 7.1 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)

  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS

  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)

    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 444.03 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [HIGH] Modularize heavy image asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 487.14 KB)
    - Serve a smaller placeholder first and load this asset only when the user scrolls to or requests the component.

- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 167.00 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 444.03 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [HIGH] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 319.40 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 444.03 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 167.00 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.

    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.

    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 568.13 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.17 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4571 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 851.74 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 6.5 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Speed Index
  - Current value: 6.4 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused JavaScript
  - Current value: Est savings of 568 KiB
  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS
  - Current value: Est savings of 168 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)
- [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
  - Current value: Est savings of 4,570 ms
  - WSG: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service)
- [HIGH] Enable text compression
  - Current value: Est savings of 285 KiB

- Redundancy recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Reduce unused javascript (est. 563.44 KB savings)
  - [HIGH] Reduce unused css (est. 167.76 KB savings)
  - [MEDIUM] Enable and verify text compression (est. 285.11 KB savings)
- Heavy initial-load requests: 6 (937.01 KB total)
- On-demand modularization candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images and media galleries (est. 111.77 KB)
    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 563.44 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [MEDIUM] Modularize heavy script asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB)
    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.
- External CSS/JS hosting checks:
  - SCRIPT www.googletagmanager.com: GREEN (Google Cloud); 2 request(s), 278.14 KB
- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.
  - [MEDIUM] Reduce third-party script payload and requests
    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 167.76 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 563.44 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 111.77 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 563.44 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 167.76 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 5111 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook

    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.

    - 2 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.

  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add canonical URL metadata
    - Use rel=canonical to reduce duplicate URL ambiguity for crawlers and tooling.
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 37 small targets on mobile and 65 on tablet.
  - [MEDIUM] Refactor fixed-width components
    - 1 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 1 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 1 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 562.32 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.20 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4286 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 851.73 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 6.2 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Speed Index
  - Current value: 5.9 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused JavaScript

  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS
  - Current value: Est savings of 168 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)
- [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources

  - WSG: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service)

  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 503.12 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.

    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.

    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.

    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.

    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.

    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.81 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.

  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 167.75 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 548.23 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 92.30 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 548.23 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 167.75 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 5071 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.51 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add canonical URL metadata
    - Use rel=canonical to reduce duplicate URL ambiguity for crawlers and tooling.
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 59 small targets on mobile and 91 on tablet.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 2 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 2 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 548.23 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 167.75 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 5071 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 862.26 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 7.9 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Speed Index
  - Current value: 8.7 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused JavaScript
  - Current value: Est savings of 548 KiB
  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS
  - Current value: Est savings of 168 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)
- [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
  - Current value: Est savings of 5,070 ms
  - WSG: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service)
- [HIGH] Enable text compression
  - Current value: Est savings of 285 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)

  - [HIGH] Reduce unused javascript (est. 502.65 KB savings)
  - [HIGH] Reduce unused css (est. 168.90 KB savings)
  - [MEDIUM] Enable and verify text compression (est. 285.11 KB savings)
- Heavy initial-load requests: 5 (799.95 KB total)
- On-demand modularization candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images and media galleries (est. 73.65 KB)
    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 502.65 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [MEDIUM] Modularize heavy script asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB)
    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.
- External CSS/JS hosting checks:
  - SCRIPT www.googletagmanager.com: GREEN (Google Cloud); 1 request(s), 141.07 KB
- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [LOW] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 168.90 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 502.65 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 73.65 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 502.65 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.90 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 4585 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add canonical URL metadata
    - Use rel=canonical to reduce duplicate URL ambiguity for crawlers and tooling.
  - [MEDIUM] Add meta description
    - Provide a concise description to improve machine interpretation and preview quality.
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 17 small targets on mobile and 49 on tablet.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 1 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 1 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 502.65 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.90 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4585 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 837.42 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 6.1 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Speed Index
  - Current value: 6.6 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused JavaScript
  - Current value: Est savings of 503 KiB
  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS
  - Current value: Est savings of 169 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)
- [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
  - Current value: Est savings of 4,590 ms
  - WSG: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service)
- [HIGH] Enable text compression

  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 563.43 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.

    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.

    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.
- External CSS/JS hosting checks:

- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.
  - [MEDIUM] Reduce third-party script payload and requests
    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 168.20 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 563.43 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 88.98 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 563.43 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.20 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 4829 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 44 small targets on mobile and 74 on tablet.
  - [MEDIUM] Refactor fixed-width components
    - 4 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 1 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 1 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 563.43 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.20 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4829 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 851.75 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 7.0 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)

- Redundancy recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Reduce unused javascript (est. 568.10 KB savings)

  - [MEDIUM] Enable and verify text compression (est. 285.11 KB savings)
- Heavy initial-load requests: 6 (937.02 KB total)
- On-demand modularization candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images and media galleries (est. 114.38 KB)
    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 568.10 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [MEDIUM] Modularize heavy script asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB)
    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.
- External CSS/JS hosting checks:
  - SCRIPT www.googletagmanager.com: GREEN (Google Cloud); 2 request(s), 278.15 KB
- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.
  - [MEDIUM] Reduce third-party script payload and requests
    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 167.84 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 568.10 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 114.38 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 568.10 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 167.84 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 4759 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] No error messaging hook
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 54 small targets on mobile and 84 on tablet.
  - [MEDIUM] Refactor fixed-width components
    - 3 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 2 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 2 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 568.10 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 167.84 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4759 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 891.41 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 7.6 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)

    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 354.13 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.18 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 5109 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 943.24 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 7.5 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)

  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 562.29 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.

    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.

    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.

- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory

    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 168.19 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 562.29 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 88.98 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 562.29 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.19 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 4556 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.

    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 547.79 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.08 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4269 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 853.32 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 6.2 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Speed Index
  - Current value: 7.7 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused JavaScript
  - Current value: Est savings of 548 KiB
  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS
  - Current value: Est savings of 168 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)
- [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
  - Current value: Est savings of 4,270 ms
  - WSG: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service)
- [HIGH] Enable text compression
  - Current value: Est savings of 285 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)

- Redundancy recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Reduce unused javascript (est. 548.02 KB savings)
  - [HIGH] Reduce unused css (est. 168.08 KB savings)
  - [MEDIUM] Enable and verify text compression (est. 285.11 KB savings)
- Heavy initial-load requests: 6 (937.01 KB total)
- On-demand modularization candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images and media galleries (est. 88.98 KB)
    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 548.02 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [MEDIUM] Modularize heavy script asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.51 KB)
    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.
- External CSS/JS hosting checks:
  - SCRIPT www.googletagmanager.com: GREEN (Google Cloud); 2 request(s), 278.13 KB
- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.
  - [MEDIUM] Reduce third-party script payload and requests
    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 168.08 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 548.02 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 88.98 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 548.02 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.08 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 4569 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.51 KB deferrable)
    - Confirm this asset is required for first paint; defer or lazy-load if not critical.
- Form validation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Missing associated label
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.

    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.

    - 6 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.

    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.

  - [MEDIUM] Missing autocomplete for tooling support
    - 1 unique form control signature(s) on this page include this issue.
- Metadata recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Complete Open Graph metadata
    - Include og:title, og:description, og:type, and og:url for robust machine-readable sharing metadata.
  - [LOW] Add twitter:card metadata
    - Include twitter card metadata to improve cross-platform machine-readable previews.
- Layout adaptation recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Increase touch target sizes
    - Ensure interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px. Detected 22 small targets on mobile and 54 on tablet.
  - [MEDIUM] Refactor fixed-width components
    - 1 element(s) exceeded viewport width in tested layouts; use responsive component constraints.
- Lightweight security recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add a Content-Security-Policy header
    - Add an appropriate CSP to reduce script injection and resource loading risk.
  - [LOW] Define a Permissions-Policy
    - Restrict browser capabilities to only what the application needs.
  - [MEDIUM] Add SRI to external scripts
    - 1 external script tag(s) are missing integrity attributes.
- Dependency maintenance recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add integrity attributes for external dependencies
    - 1 external script dependency URL(s) are missing SRI integrity attributes.
- Language/runtime version recommendations:
  - [LOW] No obvious outdated runtime version disclosed
    - No clearly outdated runtime version signals were exposed in sampled HTTP headers. Verify language/runtime versions in source and CI since backend versions are not always externally visible.
- Expected-files recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Add beneficial discoverability and maintenance files
    - Missing beneficial file(s): /.well-known/security.txt, /manifest.webmanifest, /favicon.ico.
- Compression recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Enable Brotli/gzip for text assets
    - Compress HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML responses with Brotli or gzip. Estimated savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS before transfer
    - Minification amplifies compression efficiency and reduces payload size. Estimated savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Use modern image compression formats
    - Prefer AVIF/WebP over legacy formats where possible to reduce transfer size. Estimated savings: 123.71 KB.
  - [MEDIUM] Minify JavaScript before transfer
    - Minify JS bundles so transport compression produces better results with fewer bytes. Estimated savings: 62.26 KB.
  - [LOW] Improve image encoding quality/size
    - Re-encode oversized images and tune compression quality for significant byte savings. Estimated savings: 7.37 KB.
- Optimization recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript
    - Reduce dead JS and split bundles to avoid shipping non-critical code. Estimated byte savings: 562.24 KB.
  - [HIGH] Enable text compression
    - Serve text assets with Brotli or gzip to remove avoidable transfer bloat. Estimated byte savings: 285.11 KB.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS
    - Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 168.19 KB.
  - [HIGH] Minify CSS
    - Use minified production CSS output to reduce bytes in transit. Estimated byte savings: 130.31 KB.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
    - Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 4573 ms.
  - [MEDIUM] Serve images in next-gen formats
    - Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 123.71 KB.
- Offline/caching recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Add service worker support
    - Register a service worker to support resilient caching and offline behavior for key routes.
  - [HIGH] Ensure critical routes work offline
    - Provide an offline fallback strategy for key pages and shell assets.
  - [MEDIUM] Improve web app manifest support
    - Complete manifest fields so clients can install and run an app-like experience.
  - [MEDIUM] Support offline start URL behavior
    - Ensure start URL and shell routing can load in disconnected conditions.
  - [MEDIUM] Strengthen static asset cache TTL
    - Improve long-lived cache headers for immutable static assets (estimated savings opportunity: 851.73 KB).
- [HIGH] Largest Contentful Paint
  - Current value: 6.0 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Speed Index
  - Current value: 8.0 s
  - WSG: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused JavaScript
  - Current value: Est savings of 562 KiB
  - WSG: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance)
- [HIGH] Reduce unused CSS
  - Current value: Est savings of 168 KiB
  - WSG: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information)
- [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources
  - Current value: Est savings of 4,570 ms
  - WSG: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service (https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service)
- [HIGH] Enable text compression

- On-demand modularization candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images and media galleries (est. 88.98 KB)
    - Load imagery only when it enters the viewport or when a user opens the relevant section.
  - [HIGH] Split JavaScript by route or interaction (est. 567.96 KB)
    - Move non-critical bundles behind route-level or event-driven imports so they are only fetched on demand.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical UI modules until after first render
    - Keep only above-the-fold resources in the initial path; hydrate or import secondary modules later.
  - [MEDIUM] Modularize heavy script asset from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB)
    - Load this script only on pages or interactions that require it; prefer dynamic import and feature-level bundles.

- Third-party JS recommendations:
  - [MEDIUM] Maintain a third-party JavaScript inventory
    - Track 1 third-party script origin(s) and assign an owner plus business justification for each.

    - Defer non-critical tags, remove unused vendors, and gate scripts behind consent or user interaction.
- Dead-code recommendations:
  - [HIGH] Remove unused CSS selectors and component styles (est. 168.18 KB savings)
    - Trim styles that never match rendered markup and split component CSS so only used styles are shipped.
  - [HIGH] Remove unused JavaScript and feature bundles (est. 567.96 KB savings)
    - Drop unused packages and feature code, or move them behind route-level or interaction-triggered imports.
- Non-critical loading candidates:
  - [MEDIUM] Lazy-load offscreen images (est. 88.98 KB deferrable)
    - Load below-the-fold images only when they approach the viewport.
  - [HIGH] Defer non-critical JavaScript (est. 567.96 KB deferrable)
    - Split bundles and load feature code on interaction or route transition.
  - [HIGH] Inline critical CSS and defer remainder (est. 168.18 KB deferrable)
    - Ship only above-the-fold CSS in initial render path and defer non-critical styles.
  - [HIGH] Eliminate render-blocking resources (est. 4562 ms unblock)
    - Defer scripts/styles not required for first paint and preload only truly critical assets.
  - [HIGH] Evaluate deferred loading for heavy script from administracion.gob.es (est. 248.52 KB deferrable)
